{{Quote|Imperial Intelligence knows what is best for all!|Kora Primo|<ref name="DS" />}}
'''Kora Primo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as the head of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kirima (Kalinda system)|Kirima]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. She came from a long line of intelligence agents and had over nine [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of experience.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Den of Spies|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
